description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:10-alpine Docker image and cache the node_modules/ directory. Define a single deploy stage and a deploy_prod job that runs only on the master branch. In the deploy_prod job execute the commands: yarn install, yarn run setup, yarn run build, firebase use sirkit-app --token $FIREBASE_TOKEN, and firebase deploy --only hosting -m "Pipe $CI_PIPELINE_ID Build $CI_BUILD_ID" --token $FIREBASE_TOKEN. The job publishes the built application to Firebase Hosting using the provided $FIREBASE_TOKEN.
